Game Info

Charleston Militia
Goal: capture Fort Sumter
Troops on board: 0
Home: Charleston + Castle Pinckney
Union
Goal: capture Charleston
Home: Star of the West + Fort Sumter

Dice Rules

1: Move 1 or attack next space.
2: Move 1 or 2 spaces and attack if occupied.
3: Move one troop back up to 2 spaces toward its starting position.
4: Choose an empty starting position or captured spawn point and add one troop.
5: Block a cannon space.
6: Either unblock a fort or move 1 or 2 spaces.

You cannot pass enemy troops or blocked cannons.
You rolled a 6. Choose one action.
No moves are available.
